projects.title: MDS -Innovaccer's Design System
projects.details: MDS is the design system for Innovaccer. It is used to build 20+ products for the company which includes 2 platforms

projects.title: WCAG 2.2 & Section 508 Compliance for Innovaccer
projects.details: Achieved 100% Section 508 and WCAG 2.2 AA compliance for healthcare government projects which was mandatory, by centrally audting and updating MDS.

projects.title: Voyager - AI Image & Prompt Gallery
projects.details: Pinterest-style masonry layout, smooth Framer Motion animations, effortless scroll-linked search, lazy loading, and an elegant interactive modal.

projects.title: Holovista Metaverse Demo
projects.details: Immersive Hero section with captivating visuals introducing the metaverse. Dynamic content showcasing worlds available for exploration.

projects.title: Thrifter - Thrift Like a Pro
projects.details: A dynamic e-commerce platform revolutionizing the way people shop for luxury thrifted fashion. A comprehensive UX/UI case study.
